aliases: deploy Supabase on your own server

temporal_validity.last_breaking_change: Supavisor replaced PgBouncer as default connection pooler (2024); Kong 2.8.1 is pinned version

constraints: NEVER start Supabase with default placeholder passwords from .env.example -- generate unique secrets before first boot
SERVICE_ROLE_KEY has full database access -- NEVER expose it in client-side code or public repositories
POSTGRES_PASSWORD must contain only letters and numbers (no special characters) to avoid connection string parsing issues
JWT_SECRET must be identical across GoTrue, PostgREST, Realtime, and Kong -- mismatched secrets cause silent auth failures
Docker Compose volumes store persistent data in ./volumes/ -- deleting volumes/db/data destroys all database content irreversibly
Kong API gateway is the single entry point on port 8000 -- do NOT expose individual service ports to the public internet

skip_this_unit_if.condition: Using Supabase Cloud (hosted platform) rather than self-hosting
Need Supabase CLI for local development only (not production self-hosting)
Need to deploy Supabase on Kubernetes instead of Docker Compose

inputs_needed.question: Where will you deploy Supabase self-hosted?
Which Supabase services do you need?
